DBImplementationAdministrator - Class in model
Concrete implementation of AdministratorDAO connecting to a database.
DBImplementationAdministrator() - Constructor for class model.DBImplementationAdministrator
Initializes the DAO and reads database connection settings from the configuration file.
DBImplementationBook - Class in model
Implementation of the BookDAO interface mapping interactions to a relational database.
DBImplementationBook() - Constructor for class model.DBImplementationBook
Initializes the DB implementation and fetches configuration properties.
DBImplementationClient - Class in model
Relational database mappings resolving Client logic interactions.
DBImplementationClient() - Constructor for class model.DBImplementationClient
 
DBImplementationCruise - Class in model
Concrete implementation mapping Cruise operations to a relational database.
DBImplementationCruise() - Constructor for class model.DBImplementationCruise
 
DBImplementationWorker - Class in model
Database implementation logic for matching Worker processes with a SQL connection.
DBImplementationWorker() - Constructor for class model.DBImplementationWorker
 
deleteAdministrator(String) - Method in class controller.LoginController
Deletes an administrator by calling the deleteAdministrator method of the AdministratorDAO implementation with the provided name and returns the result.
deleteAdministrator(String) - Method in interface model.AdministratorDAO
Deletes an administrator by calling the deleteAdministrator method with the provided name and returns the result.
deleteAdministrator(String) - Method in class model.DBImplementationAdministrator
This method deletes an administrator from the database based on the administrator's name.
deleteBooking(String, int, Date) - Method in class controller.LoginController
Deletes a booking given its client ID, cruise code, and start date.
deleteBooking(String, int, Date) - Method in interface model.BookDAO
Deletes an existing booking based on multiple primary keys.
deleteBooking(String, int, Date) - Method in class model.DBImplementationBook
Deletes a booking matching the provided identifiers.
deleteClient(Client) - Method in class controller.LoginController
Deletes a client by calling the deleteClient method of the ClientDAO implementation with the provided client object and returns the result.
deleteClient(Client) - Method in interface model.ClientDAO
Deletes a client by calling the deleteClient method of the ClientDAO implementation with the provided client object and returns the result.
deleteClient(Client) - Method in class model.DBImplementationClient
Deletes a client based on their identification code.
deleteCruise(String) - Method in class controller.LoginController
Deletes a cruise by calling the deleteCruise method of the CruiseDAO implementation with the provided id and returns the result.
deleteCruise(String) - Method in interface model.CruiseDAO
Deletes a cruise by calling the deleteCruise method of the CruiseDAO
deleteCruise(String) - Method in class model.DBImplementationCruise
This method deletes a cruise from the database based on the provided cruise ID.
deleteWorker(String) - Method in class controller.LoginController
Deletes a worker from the database using their ID.
deleteWorker(String) - Method in class model.DBImplementationWorker
 
deleteWorker(String) - Method in interface model.WorkerDAO
This method deletes a worker from the database based on their unique identifier (id).
destinationCity - Variable in class model.Book
 
driverDB - Variable in class model.DBImplementationBook
 
driverDB - Variable in class model.DBImplementationClient
 
driverDB - Variable in class model.DBImplementationCruise
 
driverDB - Variable in class model.DBImplementationWorker
